title: Befall ( Faces Everywhere )
description: A Nice Addition to The Broken Script
body:
Befall ( Faces Everywhere ) 
This is a simple but effective Horror mod based off of Swayle's gatekept mod in his TBS ( The Broken Script ) video.

This mod's only goal is to scare you when you least expect it, so have fun with it!

**THIS MOD IS NOT MALWARE AND DOES NOT PERFORM ANY ACTIONS OUT OF THE MINECRAFT WORLD!!  IT SIMPLY ADDS A HORROR MOBS**

**Dependencies : GeckoLib**

Official Discord : https://discord.gg/3q5zRSUn

**Credits :  
Arcaneleo_ (Leo) - Mod's Base creator and idea for the working of the mod
neiro1488_55274 (Neiro) - Final creator of the mod
thelocalfurry (Eclipse) - Forge MDK tester
_rubilove (Sylveon) - Models and Design
xenorvya (Xeno) - Textures and Audio
thierzona (SAR) - Original Idea for the mod's creation**

Created with Mcreator and Blockbench


This was uploaded by ThierZona:3 (your welcome)

**BETA RELEASE, EXPECT BUGS! REPORT ANY TO THE SUPPORT SERVER!**
